notes.body: Week ending 7/5: Sales $31,480 (+5.7% W/W), COGS $9,694, CP% 30.8, FP% 23.0. Close the stacked CT tasks: Labor Review open 7/1-7/5, Post Period-Labor Not Posted (7/5), Inv-Final for Post (7/5). Close tasks the day they land — don't let them stack again.

The Power of One — One Brand, One Team, One Family. The Operations Manual is the single source of truth; execute consistently in Hiring, Training, Leadership, Daily Operations. Never run short-staffed — keep a minimum of six Shift Leaders and develop two future GMs a year. 100% shopper scores are attainable via the Halo Effect, Suggestive Selling, and grill culture. Standing: June budget in the workbook, Large soda 30 cents up, Blackberry counter sign, Orientation Checklist with new hires.

K.P.I. Ranking: 60% of our score comes from Secret Shop scores, Customer complaints (CSPs), and Ticket times. Coach unhappy guests early; spot-check register (fry/drink/shake every time); correct grill culture (2 for guys/1 for girls); stay rush-ready. Standing (6/18): outside vendor calls still need a Hub ticket. Welcome Hannah Kaufman, new HR/Payroll.

THREE straight 100% shops on the board — 6/25 Dinner, 6/24 Late Dinner, 6/21 Lunch. June closed 95.0% (record). Store YTD 85.3% (37 shops). Protect the streak: Halo Effect, ticket times under 6 min, offer the shake every ticket.
